feature: production-grade reliability for SDKConnect (auto reconnect, ICE recovery hook, silent token refresh hook, adaptive audio-priority fallback, configurable network thresholds, reconnect/recovered/token events)
constraints_preserved: JWT expiry enforced before media connect
Invalid signals emit error events (no silent drops)
Facade split preserves a single CallEngine authority
Accept flows fail fast on callType mismatches
verified_facts: SDKConnect reliability flow supports automatic reconnect orchestration
ICE recovery integration is available as a dedicated recovery hook
Silent token refresh is supported through a non-disruptive refresh hook
Adaptive audio-priority fallback can preserve continuity during degraded network conditions
Network quality thresholds are configurable for deployment tuning
Reconnect, recovered, and token lifecycle events are available for consumer observability
